goal: Add a real adapter M6-RC prerequisite audit mode to the existing runner so the remaining completion blocker can be checked deterministically before a live run. The audit must report adapter artifact path readiness, adapter manifest readiness, strict model cache readiness, Docker image availability, host CUDA visibility, fake-backend absence, and token readiness without claiming M6-RC GO. Current environment is expected to remain NOT_READY/NOT_GO because no real trained adapter or CUDA device is present.
head: c26ffe4
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC GO before live structured endpoint evidence exists
Weakening real adapter endpoint evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may extend the RC evidence runner with prerequisite audit mode, update focused tests, generate prereq audit evidence, update WORKING.md, and update this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Runner preflight-only mode writes machine-readable readiness checks
Preflight-only mode does not execute adapter intake, endpoint capture, or M6 GO verification
Current prereq audit reports NOT_READY without claiming M6-RC GO
Current M6 verifier remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint blocker
warnings: This gate does not provide a real trained adapter.
This gate does not run live Docker endpoint transcripts.
M6-RC remains NOT_GO until a real trained CUDA lora_adapter, strict model cache, exported Docker image, CUDA host, and no-fake endpoint evidence are all available.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped prereq audit gate for the real adapter M6-RC closeout path.
phase_notes.audit: Read current WORKING.md, M6 CTO decision, previous real adapter evidence, and current repo/tmp prerequisites. Found no real adapter path under /tmp/mib-real-adapter, no mib-export:test image, and no host nvidia-smi; strict model cache path exists.
phase_notes.build: Extended scripts/run_m6_real_adapter_rc_gate.py with --preflight-only, structured preflight checks, Docker image inspect, host CUDA visibility check, and clearer missing-prerequisite details. Added focused tests for preflight-only NOT_READY behavior without executing intake/capture/M6 steps.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused pytest, preflight-only audit JSON generation, generated JSON validation, M6 verifier expected NOT_GO, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: Prerequisite audit tooling is complete. Current environment is NOT_READY and M6-RC remains NOT_GO because live real trained adapter endpoint evidence is absent.

pabcd.approved_scope: RC runner prereq audit mode, focused tests, generated evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no M6 GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
